zh.lifeSummary: 當John Upton Of Tralaske於1432年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Baron Thomas Upton of Treloish26歲，母親Joan Trelawny5歲。他於1460年與Elizabeth Mohun結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1489年在他的家鄉享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: Upton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in England called Upton, most of which are named with Old English upp ‘upper’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different origins, such as one in Essex, originally named with the phrase upp in tūne ‘up in the settlement’, i.e. the higher part of the settlement, and Upton Lovell (Wiltshire), which derives from the Old English personal name Ubba + Old English tūn. This name was brought to Ireland (Antrim) in 1598 by Henry Upton, from Upton in Devon.

variants.name: Uptain
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of English   Upton  .

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Upton Of Tralaske was born in 1432, in Devon, England, his father, Baron Thomas Upton of Treloish, was 26 and his mother, Joan Trelawny, was 5. He married Elizabeth Mohun in 1460. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1489, in his hometown, at the age of 57.

Il a épousé Elizabeth Mohun en 1460. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1489, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: John Upton Of Tralaske(이)가 1432년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baron Thomas Upton of Treloish(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Trelawny(은)는 5세였다. 그는 1460년 Elizabeth Mohun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1489년 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Upton Of Tralaske родился в 1432 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Baron Thomas Upton of Treloish было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Trelawny, 5. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Mohun в 1460 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1489 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.
